titleStmt.title: SII 19.162: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 162. (A.R. No. 219 of 1907.) TIRUVIḌAIMARUDŪR, KUMBHAKONAM TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT. ON THE NORTH, WEST AND SOUTH WALLS OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE, MAHĀLIṄGASVĀMI TEMPLE.

summary.p: The inscription is of the time of Uttama-Chōḷa. It is much damaged. It seems to register the purchase, tax-free, of two vēli of land from the assembly of Pērāvūr by public sale, by the officer of the king, Kōyil-Mayilai alias Madhurāntaka Mūvēndavēḷān of Śiṟṟiṅgaṇ for presentation to the temple of Śrī Mūlasthānattu-Perumānaḍigaḷ at Tiruviḍaimarudil. This transaction is stated to have been effected with the concurrence (?) of the sabhā of Tiraimūr as the dēvakarmis (trustees) of the temple, the Nagarattār of Tiruviḍaimarudil, Iṅgaṇṇāṭṭu-Pallavaraiyar the śrīkāryam of the temple on behalf of the adhikāri (officer) and the accountant in the temple, Tirunāvukkaraiyaṉ Śivaṉ on behalf of Nambirāṭṭiyār (queen) Chōḷa-Mādēviyār, all being assembled together in the temple. The officer Madhurāntaka-Mūvēndavēḷār figures in another inscription of Uttama-Chōḷa published in S.I.I. Vol. III (p. 307).

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . kopparakecari panmaṟkki yāṇṭu 6Āvatu tiruviṭaimarutuṭaiyār teva kanmiḷāṉa tiraimur sabhaiyārum tiruvi
ṭaimarutil nakarattārum Atikārikaḷ maturāntakamuventaveḷārkkāyt tiruviṭai marutuṭaiyār śrīkāryamārāykiṉṟa Iṅkaṇ
ṇāṭṭup pallavaraiyarum nampirāṭṭiyār coḻamahāteviyārkkāy tiruviṭaimarutuṭai yārkkuk kaṇkāṇikkaṇakku Eḻu
tukiṉṟa tirunāvukkaraiyaṉ civaṉum Ivvaṉaivoḻum Uṭaiyār koyililey Iḻuyat ciṟṟiṅkaṇuṭaiyāṉ koyiṉmayilaiyā
ṉa maturāntakamuventaveḷāṉ perāvūrnāṭṭut tevatāṉam perāvūr sabhai Iṭaiy
Iṟaiyiliy koṇṭa nilam tiruviṭaimarutil śrīmulastāṉattup perumāṉaṭikaḷukku
Inta tanta nilattukku tanta Iṟaiyiliyolaiy kalveṭṭiṉapaṭiy ko
pparakecaripanmaṟkki yāṇṭu 6Āvatu Āṟāmāṇṭaraṉittiṅkaḷ matinā
ṭpakkam pañcamiy nāḷ kaḷa Ituvāṇṭitu tiṅkaḷ Itunāḷ Itu pakkam Ituparuvamāka Irumāṭu
ñ cāṟṟiya mummāṭu keḻvittu perāvūr sabhaiyom muṉpakal naṉpakal Āvaṇattuk keṭṭu Īḻa
kkācu Iṟaiyili paṇam Ivvūr sabhaiyār perāvūr nilattil kkit tarutum koṇṭu vilai taruvir �llaiyoveṉṟu muṟkkū
ṟa Ammoḻikeṭṭu nilamuṭaiya I ṟi maturāntaka muventaveḷāṉ niyṅkaḷ Iṉakku viṟṟuttanta nilam Iruveli Iṉṉila
m Iruveliyum candratittavaṟ Iṟaimutal kātta kkuk koṇṭu kuṭup
pom Oru kālāvatu mirukālāvatu Iṟaiyili Iṟaiyiliyākkit takutu
ḻi keṭṭum pāṭakam ciṟṟiṅkaṇuṭaiyār Ik koyilileyivar
koṇṭu kuṭuppo muṟkūṟap perāvūr sabhai
yom Eṅkaḷūr nilam Iruveliyum candrātitaval nilam Irukālāvatu mukkālāvatum llaiyoveṉṟu muṟkūṟi
p piṟkūṟiya Iṅkaṇāṭṭuc ciṟṟiṅkaṇuṭaiyāṉ koyil mayilaiyāṉa matu vilaikoṇṭuṭaiya nilam Iruveliyum śandrātittaval Iṟaiyi
liyākkit taril vilaikoṇṭuṭaiya māṉattup perā kuṭup� Orukālāvatu Irukālāvatu mukkālāvatu koḷveṉeṉṟu viṟkū
ṟa muṟkūṟiya perāvūr sabhaiyom śantrātittaval Iṟaiyiliyāka nilattukkellai ki
ḻpārkkellai tevaṉ kālil kiḻakku nokkip poṉavāykkālukkut teṟkum Iṉṉum
lai ṉ Araṅka tamaiyaṉmār makkaḷ nilattukku meṟkkum teṉpārk kellai
kkum melpārkkellai cuṭukāṭṭukkukki ṉpārkkellai cuṭukāṭṭiṉ vaṭavaru� Ivvūrk kuḷattiṉiṉṟum
vaṭakkum Iṉṉam Iṉṉilattukkel ṉu miṉṉi�ttukkey teṉpārk kellai Ivvūr kuḷattukke va
l pārkkellai tiruvaṭikaḷ kuḷattukku kiḻakku kkaṉ nilattukkum
vicaitta perunāṉkellaiyilum naṭuvuṭpaṭṭa nilam Iruveliyum Iṉṉilam Iruveli
lkaḷum kiṇaṟukaḷum Uṭpaṭa Ivvicainta perunāṉkellaiyilum naṭuvupaṭṭa ni
tikkuṟaimai Uḷḷaṭaṅka Uṇṇilam Oḻiviṉṟiye Iṉṉilam
kaikkoṇṭa Īḻakkācu
koṇṭom koṇṭa kācu
10� kācu nūṟṟaimpatuṅ ko
śandrātittavaṟ Iṟaiili
y kalveṭṭi viṟṟukkuṭutte
ttiruviṭaimarutuṭaiya māte
Digital edition of SII 19.162 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
